visual_markers: Gray centers with dark brown margins
Lesions on collar, nodes, and panicle neck
icar_organic_treatment_2026: Pseudomonas fluorescens seed treatment (10g/kg) and foliar spray of Trichoderma viride enriched formulations at immediate sign of lesions.

visual_markers: Water-soaked to yellowish stripes on leaf blades
Wavy margins with bacterial ooze in early morning
Drying of leaves from tip downwards
icar_organic_treatment_2026: Cow dung extract (20%) foliar spray combined with early morning application of botanical biopesticides (neem-based Azadirachtin 1500ppm).

visual_markers: Oval or irregular greenish-gray spots on leaf sheaths
Lesions expanding to have brown margins and pale centers
Typically starts near the water level
icar_organic_treatment_2026: Application of Trichoderma harzianum (2.5 kg/ha) mixed with farmyard manure (FYM) broadcast during tillering phase.

visual_markers: Round to oval, dark brown lesions
Infected seeds show dark and discolored spots
icar_organic_treatment_2026: Seed soaking in 1% Agniastra (indigenous botanical mixture) and maintaining proper soil nutrition using Jeevamrutha to prevent macro-nutrient stress.

visual_markers: Deadheart (drying of the central whorl) in vegetative stage
Whiteheads (empty, white panicles) in reproductive stage
Visible entry holes on the stem
icar_organic_treatment_2026: Installation of pheromone traps (20 traps/ha) and timed release of Trichogramma japonicum egg parasitoids based on predictive climatic flight alerts.
